sections.heading: This Act may be cited as the Gold Trade (Repeal) Act, Short title
In this Act, unless the context otherwise requires— Interpretation
sections.text:
“ Director ” means the Director of Mines appointed under
the Mines and Minerals Development Act, 2015; and Act No. 11
of 2015
“ repealed Act ” means the Gold Trade Act. Cap. 396

sections.heading: (1) The Gold Trade Act, 1912, is hereby repealed. Repeal of
sections.text:
Cap. 396
(2) Notwithstanding subsection (1), a person who, at the
commencement of this Act, is a holder of a licence or permit issued
under the repealed Act shall, within six months after such Cap. 396
commencement, apply to the Director for a licence, except that
the Director shall only grant a permit for the unexpired period for
which it was granted under the repealed Act. Cap. 369
Single copies of this Act may be obtained from the Government Printer,
P.O. Box 30136, 10101 Lusaka, Price K2.00 each.
246
